headline: McDonald's Expands Beverage Menu With Energy Drinks
summary: New offerings aim to capture growing demand for flavored and functional drinks

headline: Starbucks upgraded at Jefferies on improved turnaround visibility
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies upgraded Starbucks Corp. to Hold from Underperform on Monday, citing reduced international exposure following the completion of a China joint venture deal and early signs of stabilization in the company’s core U.S. business.
